title: Pong
description: A simple two-dimensional table-tennis game that became the first commercially successful video game.
significance: Pong launched the commercial video game industry and made Atari a household name.

title: Space Invaders
description: Players defend Earth from descending rows of aliens in this landmark fixed shooter.
significance: Sparked the golden age of arcade games and popularized high-score competition.

title: Pac-Man
description: Guide Pac-Man through a maze eating pellets while avoiding four distinct ghosts.
significance: Became a global cultural icon and one of the highest-grossing games of all time.

title: Donkey Kong
description: Jumpman climbs construction sites to rescue a lady from a giant ape.
significance: Introduced Mario (then 'Jumpman') and established the platformer genre.

title: Tetris
description: Arrange falling tetromino blocks to complete and clear lines.
significance: One of the best-selling and most ported games ever; a defining puzzle game.

title: Super Mario Bros.
description: Mario journeys through the Mushroom Kingdom to rescue Princess Peach from Bowser.
significance: Revived the home console market and set the template for the platformer.

title: The Legend of Zelda
description: Link explores the land of Hyrule, solving dungeons to rescue Princess Zelda.
significance: Pioneered open exploration and battery-backed saves in console games.

title: DOOM
description: A space marine battles demons across Mars and Hell in fast-paced 3D combat.
significance: Defined the first-person shooter and popularized multiplayer deathmatch and modding.

title: Super Mario 64
description: Mario explores Princess Peach's castle in a fully 3D world of paintings and stars.
significance: Set the standard for 3D movement and camera control in games.

title: Final Fantasy VII
description: Cloud Strife and allies fight the Shinra corporation and the villain Sephiroth.
significance: Brought JRPGs to a mass Western audience and showcased cinematic storytelling.

title: The Legend of Zelda: Ocarina of Time
description: Link travels through time to stop Ganondorf in a landmark 3D adventure.
significance: Frequently cited as one of the greatest games ever; pioneered Z-targeting.

title: Half-Life
description: Scientist Gordon Freeman survives an alien incursion at the Black Mesa facility.
significance: Revolutionized FPS storytelling with seamless, scripted environmental narrative.

title: Halo: Combat Evolved
description: The Master Chief fights the Covenant and the parasitic Flood on a ringworld.
significance: The Xbox's killer app; refined console FPS controls and multiplayer.

title: Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas
description: CJ returns to a sprawling open-world state to rebuild his crew and empire.
significance: A defining open-world game and one of the best-selling PS2 titles.

title: World of Warcraft
description: Millions of players adventure together across the persistent world of Azeroth.
significance: The defining MMORPG, reaching over 12 million subscribers at its peak.

title: Wii Sports
description: Motion-controlled tennis, bowling, baseball, golf, and boxing for everyone.
significance: Bundled with the Wii, it brought gaming to a vast new mainstream audience.

title: Minecraft
description: Players mine, craft, and build in a procedurally generated blocky world.
significance: The best-selling video game of all time, with over 300 million copies sold.

title: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: Monster hunter Geralt searches a war-torn open world for his adopted daughter.
significance: Acclaimed for its open world and side-quest writing; won numerous GOTY awards.

title: The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild
description: Link awakens to explore a vast, systemic open-world Hyrule.
significance: Redefined open-world design and anchored the Switch's launch.

title: Fortnite
description: Up to 100 players fight to be the last one standing while building structures.
significance: A free-to-play cultural phenomenon that popularized the battle royale and live events.

title: Elden Ring
description: A challenging open-world journey through the Lands Between to become Elden Lord.
significance: Brought FromSoftware's 'Soulslike' design to an open world and won multiple GOTY awards.
